causalAutopsy.notes: Follow-up to the 2026-06-26 resource-exhaustion kernel panic (os_refcnt overflow) whose disk arm was fixed in #1290. The panic's process/handle arm had NO measurement: the ResourceLedger samples CPU%/RSS but not the per-machine PROCESS COUNT that actually climbed (dominated by idle MCP servers). This adds that missing measurement so the next climb is visible.
